name: Abyss Actor - Liberty Dramatist
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リバティ・ドラマチスト
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
When a monster declares an attack: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card to your opponent's field. You can only use this effect of "Abyss Actor - Liberty Dramatist" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Special Summoned from the Pendulum Zone: The owner of this card reveals 3 "Abyss Script" Spells from their Deck, their opponent randomly picks 1 for this card's owner to Set on their field (but the owner destroys it during the End Phase), also shuffle the rest into the Deck. If this card is destroyed: You can shuffle 1 "Abyss Script" Spell from your GY into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Abyss Actor - Liberty Dramatist" once per turn.
pend_eff: When a monster declares an attack: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card to your opponent's field. You can only use this effect of "Abyss Actor - Liberty Dramatist" once per turn.

If this card is destroyed: You can shuffle 1 "Abyss Script" Spell from your GY into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Abyss Actor - Liberty Dramatist" once per turn.

If this card is destroyed: You can shuffle 1 "Abyss Script" Spell from your GY into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Abyss Actor - Liberty Dramatist" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone to your opponent's field
